info.title: dydo
info.description: DynaDocs (dydo) - Documentation-driven context and agent orchestration for AI coding assistants.

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: Path to docs folder or file to check

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: Path to docs folder or file to fix

options.name: --join
options.description: Join an existing DynaDocs project as a new team member

options.name: --agents
options.description: Number of agents to create/assign (skips prompt)

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Show graph connections for a documentation file

options.name: --incoming
options.description: Show docs that link TO this file (backlinks)

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Show document link statistics ranked by incoming links

commands.name: claim
commands.description: Claim an agent for this terminal

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all agents across all humans

options.name: --task
options.description: Task name to associate with this role

arguments.name: ROLE
arguments.description: Role to set (code-writer, reviewer, co-thinker, docs-writer, planner, test-writer)

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new agent and assign to a human

arguments.name: HUMAN
arguments.description: Human to assign the agent to

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove an agent from the pool

commands.name: reassign
commands.description: Reassign an agent to a different human

arguments.name: HUMAN
arguments.description: New human to assign the agent to

commands.name: tree
commands.description: Show dispatch hierarchy of active agents

commands.name: guard
commands.description: Check if current agent can perform action (used by hooks)

options.name: --action
options.description: Action being attempted (edit, write, delete, read)

commands.name: lift
commands.description: Temporarily lift RBAC restrictions for an agent

arguments.name: AGENT
arguments.description: Agent name to lift guard for

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Restore RBAC restrictions for an agent

arguments.name: AGENT
arguments.description: Agent name to restore guard for

options.name: --brief-file
options.description: Path to a file containing the brief

options.name: --no-launch
options.description: Don't launch new terminal, just write to inbox

options.name: --agent
options.description: Send dispatch to specific agent (skips auto-selection)

options.name: --escalate
options.description: Mark dispatch as escalated after repeated failures

options.name: --auto-close
options.description: Auto-close the dispatched agent's terminal after release

options.name: --tab
options.description: Launch in a new tab (overrides config)

options.name: --new-window
options.description: Launch in a new window (overrides config)

options.name: --wait
options.description: Wait for a response from the dispatched agent

options.name: --no-wait
options.description: Dispatch and return immediately (fire and forget)

options.name: --worktree
options.description: Run dispatched agent in a git worktree for isolated work

options.name: --queue
options.description: Named queue to serialize terminal launch (e.g., --queue merge)

commands.name: list
commands.description: List agents with pending inbox items

commands.name: message, msg
commands.description: Send a message to another agent

options.name: --task
options.description: Only wake on messages with this subject

options.name: --cancel
options.description: Cancel an active wait (remove wait marker)

arguments.name: NAME
arguments.description: Task name (or use --all to approve all)

options.name: --needs-review
options.description: Show only tasks needing human review

options.name: --found-by
options.description: How the issue was found (inquisition, review, manual). Defaults to manual.

commands.name: coverage
commands.description: Show inquisition coverage across project areas

options.name: --force
options.description: Force clean even if agents are working

options.name: --task
options.description: Clean workspaces associated with a task

arguments.name: AGENT
arguments.description: Agent name or letter to clean

commands.name: check
commands.description: Verify workflow requirements before session end

commands.name: audit
commands.description: View and visualize agent activity logs

options.name: --session
options.description: Show details for a specific session ID

commands.name: compact
commands.description: Compact audit snapshots using baseline+delta compression

arguments.name: YEAR
arguments.description: Year to compact (e.g., 2026). Defaults to current year.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite even if re-anchoring fails (backs up first)

options.name: --all
options.description: Remove all role files (including custom) before regenerating base roles

commands.name: create
commands.description: Scaffold a new custom role definition file

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate dydo configuration, role files, and agent state

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the watchdog (if not already running)

commands.name: worktree
commands.description: Manage git worktrees for agent dispatch

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Remove agent's worktree markers and clean up worktree if last reference

arguments.name: WORKTREE-ID
arguments.description: The worktree ID to clean up

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge worktree branch back into base branch

options.name: --finalize
options.description: Finalize a merge after resolving conflicts

commands.name: init-settings
commands.description: Copy settings.local.json to worktree with Read permission for main repo path

options.name: --main-root
options.description: Absolute path to the main project root

commands.name: prune
commands.description: Remove orphaned worktree directories and stale markers

arguments.name: NAME
arguments.description: Queue name (optional, shows all if omitted)

commands.name: cancel
commands.description: Remove a pending (not active) queue entry

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clear all entries from a queue
